name: Shenzhen Magic Design & Decoration Engineering Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Magic Design & Decoration Engineering Co., Ltd. operates in the architectural decoration industry in China. It operates as a contractor for electronic engineering, building intelligent engineering construction, engineering design, laboratory system, fire-fighting device, mechatronics, building curtain wall, building decoration, and landscaping works. The company was founded in 1984 and is based in Shenzhen, China.
